final_prompt.prompt:
Create a cinematic sci-fi space scene featuring an astronaut in Earth orbit.

Style/medium: needs a cinematic sci-fi space aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include the astronaut as central subject, with space station structure at frame edges
Subject: must include an astronaut in detailed spacesuit, one
Scene/backdrop: must include Earth orbit setting, the Milky Way and nebulae in the background
Lighting/mood: needs a dramatic epic atmosphere with light from Earth reflection — exact light source balance is yours
Color palette: needs a cosmic spectacular direction — exact color values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs detailed spacesuit surface treatment — exact material finish is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must preserve the epic grandeur described
Avoid:
